title: kentia warteliana
intro: Kentia warteliana, also known as the Kentia palm or Howea forsteriana, is a species of palm tree native to Lord Howe Island. It has been reported to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds, which are said to aid in wound healing and fight off infections. The health benefits of Kentia warteliana include its potential to reduce stress and improve air quality, as it is known to purify the air and promote a sense of calm. Herbal preparations of Kentia warteliana typically involve drying the leaves, which can then be used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
